About Me

The Developer Behind the Builds

🎮
SirAlex
Roblox Builder & Environment Dev
🏔️ Environment Design
🎨 Mid-Poly Builds
💎 High-Poly Builds
⚡ Performance Opt.
🗺️ Map Design
✨ Stylized Worlds
✅ 4+ Years Experience
🚀 10M+ Visits
⭐ Open for Work

I'm a Roblox developer and builder with over 4 years of experience creating environments on the platform. Over that time, I've contributed to projects that have collectively reached 10+ million visits, mainly focusing on building detailed worlds that make games feel more immersive and alive.

My main focus is mid-poly and high-poly environments, where I try to balance visual quality with performance so the builds not only look great but also run smoothly in-game. I've worked on a variety of projects over the years, from stylized maps to more detailed and complex environments.

Commissions

Pricing & Rates

Every project is unique. Here's a general guide to what you can expect.

Commission Range
$25 – $1,500
Pricing varies based on complexity & project scope
🌱
Simple Assets
Individual props, small builds, basic environments
$25+
🏗️
Mid-Size Maps
Detailed areas, stylized maps, moderate complexity
$150+
🌍
Large Environments
Full game worlds, complex terrain, high detail
$500+
👑
Premium Projects
Flagship game maps, maximum detail & polish
$1,500
📋
How It Works
My pricing depends on the complexity and size of the project. Most commissions usually fall somewhere between $25 and $1,500.

Smaller assets or simple builds are on the lower end, while large maps, highly detailed environments, or more complex builds will naturally cost more.
💰 $25 – $1,500 Commission Range
